creator: Z462vasa@mail.lviv.ua
text:
I do not ping 192.168.3.111 ( iphone 7) with freebsd ( 12.0-STABLE FreeBSD 12.0-STABLE GENERIC  amd64  192.168.3.1 )

I ping 192.168.3.30 (mint19) with freebsd (192.168.3.1)

I ping from 192.168.3.30 to 192.168.3.111


ping 192.168.3.1 -> 192.168.3.30 = yes
ping 192.168.3.1 -> 192.168.3.111 = no
???????????????????????????????????????????????

ping 192.168.3.30 -> 192.168.3.111 = yes


192.168.3.1   freebsd
192.168.3.111 iphone 7
192.168.3.30  mint19

tcp_extensions="NO"
tcp_drop_synfin="YES"
icmp_drop_redirect="YES"
icmp_log_redirect="YES"
portsentry_enable="YES"
fail2ban_enable="YES"


 dhcpd[52475]: Dynamic and static leases present for 192.168.3.111.


 kernel: arp: d4:dc:cd:90:b1:46 attempts to modify permanent entry for 192.168.3.111 on bce1
